REGISTER	name	inner	overwrite
REGISTER	name	outer	overwrite
REGISTER	tags	inner	append
REGISTER	tags	outer	unregistered
REGISTER	scratch	inner	overwrite
INNER_UPDATE	name	alice
INNER_UPDATE	tags	red
INNER_UPDATE	scratch	tmp1
CROSS
GET_INNER	name
GET_OUTER	name
GET_INNER	tags
GET_OUTER	tags
GET_INNER	scratch
